name: Italian Wolf (Kemono Friends)
description:
Because someone had to, meet one of the Wolf Federations most obsessed girls!

"Loved" by Grey Wolf and adored by lots.

(may not be accurate :3)

"The Italian Wolf is a subspecies of the Gray Wolf that can be found in the Apennine Mountains in Italy, and has recently spread to Southern France and certain areas of Switzerland. They were recognized as a distinct subspecies in 1999. The Italian Wolf is considered to be medium sized, with their body being 100-140 cm (39-55 in) in length. They normally have a gray or brown colored fur.

Italian Wolves are nocturnal predators, with their diet consisting mainly on medium sized animals such as Chamois, Roe Deer, Red Deer and Wild Boar, and feeding on smaller animals like hares and rabbits when the larger prays are absent. Wolf packs in Italy are often smaller, due to the lack of large prey in the area."

Art by sasa_fune
creator: eduardboscut
